name: The Proving
title: We run our own metal through this forge.
body: YardWorx runs landscaping companies; SalesWorx spars with salespeople — proved the way armor is: struck, dented, stamped. The web work? You’re scrolling through it.
entry_state: steady warm ember light now ambient through the passage
exit_state: full warm ambience with a deep amber glow rising from somewhere below at the chamber far end
still_169:
Cinematic photorealistic night world of an ancient Celtic iron forge carved into black bedrock. Near-total darkness — the only light: full warm ember ambience with focused ember light falling on the gallery pieces. Deep near-black shadows (#0A0908); where lit, molten amber highlights (#E9A94F), ember orange (#E2622B), rust (#B5623A), warm cream glow (#E7CFAE); where dead, cold ash grey-blue on black iron. Volumetric smoke haze, wet black stone with faint reflections, subtle carved Celtic knotwork worked into the rock surfaces. Dark industrial realism, low-key chiaroscuro lighting, anamorphic cinematic feel, atmospheric depth. No people, no figures, no hands, no text, no letters, no numbers, no signage, no logos.
Subject: a gallery chamber carved in black rock displaying tested metalwork: at center, two monumental struck metal reliefs on stone plinths as the heroes under focused ember light — one depicting terraced gardens worked in dark iron, one depicting a circular sparring arena worked in dark iron — with dented iron proof pieces bearing hammered stamp marks lining the walls.

leg_prompt: The camera continues the same slow, steady forward drift it was already in, without any pause, jump, or reversal. Cinematic photorealistic night world of an ancient Celtic iron forge carved into black bedrock. Near-total darkness — the only light: steady warm ember light now ambient through the passage. Deep near-black shadows (#0A0908); where lit, molten amber highlights (#E9A94F), ember orange (#E2622B), rust (#B5623A), warm cream glow (#E7CFAE); where dead, cold ash grey-blue on black iron. Volumetric smoke haze, wet black stone with faint reflections, subtle carved Celtic knotwork worked into the rock surfaces. Dark industrial realism, low-key chiaroscuro lighting, anamorphic cinematic feel, atmospheric depth. No people, no figures, no hands, no text, no letters, no numbers, no signage, no logos. Drifting forward through the ember-lit passage, the camera enters a gallery chamber carved in black rock just as the returning light arrives with it: dented iron proof pieces bearing hammered stamp marks line the walls and catch the warm light one by one, and at center two monumental struck metal reliefs stand on stone plinths — one depicting terraced gardens in dark iron, one depicting a circular sparring arena in dark iron. Without slowing, the camera performs a slow half-orbit past the two plinth reliefs, curving around them while always keeping forward momentum, the focused ember light gathering into full warm ambience across the gallery, then continues past the plinths toward the far end of the chamber, where a deep amber glow rises from somewhere below. Single continuous camera move with no cuts. Smooth, graceful, slow cinematic motion. No people, no text. In the final second the camera settles into a slow, steady forward drift, perfectly smooth.
